news.t: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX Single-Stock ETFs on BMNR, CRWV, and CRCL

holdings.infoBox: BMNU is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long BMNR Daily Target ETF (BMNU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BitMine Immersion Technologies Inc index. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Bitmine Immersion Technologies, Inc. stock (NYSE: BMNR), less fees, and expenses BMNU was launched on Sep 26, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX Single-Stock ETFs on BMNR, CRWV, and CRCL
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares is pleased to announce the launch of three new leveraged and inverse ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long BMNR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: BMNU), the T-REX 2X Inverse CRWV Daily Targ...
